name: samtools_execution_tool
description: Run local samtools on BAM, SAM, or CRAM inputs and return deterministic alignment QC summaries such as flagstat, stats, and idxstats.

help.summary: Run curated samtools alignment-QC commands on the active BAM, SAM, or CRAM source.

modes.name: qc
modes.description: Run quickcheck, general stats, and idxstats-style review for the active alignment file.

options.name: mode
options.description: Workflow mode. The current ChatGenome build supports the qc preset.

options.name: quickcheck
options.description: Check whether the alignment file is structurally readable.

options.name: idxstats
options.description: Report mapped and unmapped counts by contig when indexing information is available.

notes: Uses the active BAM, SAM, or CRAM source by default.
Some summaries depend on index availability.
